description_long: This object is a large, multi-story building facade with a prominent mansard roof, featuring dormer windows and detailed architectural trim. The structure has three main floors with regularly spaced rectangular windows, and a ground level that includes large storefront windows and arched doorways. The roof is clad in gray shingles, with triangular pediments above the dormers and decorative cornices along the roofline. The facade is painted in muted gray and beige tones, with pilasters and window frames providing visual contrast. The overall design is reminiscent of European urban architecture, suggesting a historic or classical style suitable for city streets.
description: A multi-story building facade with a mansard roof, dormer windows, and detailed trim in gray and beige tones. The ground level features large storefront windows and arched doorways.
description_view_0: The rear or side view shows the plain, unadorned wall and the full expanse of the mansard roof, with minimal architectural detail.
description_view_1: The front-left view highlights the main facade, including the arched doorway, storefront windows, and the detailed roof with dormers and pediments.
description_view_2: The direct front view centers on the symmetrical arrangement of windows, the main entrance, and the prominent roof features.
description_view_3: The front-right view displays the second arched doorway, storefront windows, and the architectural symmetry of the facade and roof.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the facade of a multi-story building above ground-level storefronts
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid color with subtle architectural detailing
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight with decorative cornices and pediments
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame integrated into building architecture
